lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in fair condition.

Discover your next adventure with this fantastic find! This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained, offering a smooth and reliable driving experience. While it shows some light signs of use consistent with its history, its solid performance and overall quality make it a dependable choice for your daily commute or weekend getaways.

This vehicle is in poor overall condition and is being sold strictly as-is. The exterior shows significant signs of age and neglect, including several large dents, deep scratches, and advancing rust on the lower body panels. The interior is heavily worn with multiple tears in the upholstery and non-functional electronic components. Mechanically, the car requires immediate attention; it suffers from a persistent oil leak, a rough idle, and the suspension is significantly compromised. This would be a suitable purchase only for someone looking for a major project or a source for spare parts.

This vehicle is in good condition, having been consistently maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior paint remains vibrant, though you may find a few minor stone chips and light scratches upon close inspection. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, with the seats and dashboard showing only minimal wear. Mechanically, the car is sound; it starts reliably, handles well, and has no known major leaks or mechanical issues. It serves as a great example of a well-cared-for vehicle that is ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior paint and body have no scratches or dents. The interior is in original condition with no visible wear or staining. All mechanical components are in perfect working order.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior and interior show moderate signs of wear and tear. All major mechanical and electrical systems are currently operational, though some components show age and may require maintenance soon.

We are pleased to present this superlative specimen, maintained in an uncompromising state of preservation. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, offering an interior and exterior finish that remains indistinguishable from its original showroom debut. A rare opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle of peerless quality and pedigree.

Hey there! You've gotta see this absolute beauty. It's in incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've babied this car since day one, and it's been kept in pristine condition inside and out. It drives like a total dream and is ready for its next adventure. You won't find another one this clean! Come check it out and see for yourself!

This E92 M3 is a superlative example of high-revving, naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the iconic 4.0L S65 V8 engine. Meticulously maintained to a museum-grade standard, this vehicle boasts a pristine factory finish and an interior devoid of bolster wear or UV degradation. Performance is optimized via a lightning-fast M-DCT dual-clutch transmission and a M-Variable limited-slip differential, ensuring clinical power delivery. Preventative maintenance is comprehensive, with rod bearings and throttle actuators addressed using uprated components to ensure long-term mechanical integrity. The chassis remains exceptionally tight, complemented by Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and a carbon fiber roof that lowers the center of gravity for superior lateral dynamics. This is a rare, investment-grade specimen for the collector who prioritizes mechanical
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Mechanically perfect.

Presenting a truly collector-grade vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero paint chips or imperfections, while the interior remains in pristine condition, featuring supple, crease-free leather and that unmistakable 'new car' scent. Every electronic component functions flawlessly, and the engine bay is meticulously detailed. This vehicle has been strictly garage-kept and maintained with an open-checkbook policy, backed by a complete folder of service records. From the flawless alloy wheels to the original floor mats, no detail has been overlooked. This is an exceptional opportunity for a discerning buyer seeking a showroom-ready example with absolutely zero compromises.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Meticulously maintained and presented in showroom condition, it offers an unrivaled driving experience for the discerning collector. Every detail, from the pristine exterior finish to the flawless interior appointments, reflects a standard of care that is increasingly rare. We invite you to experience this exceptional example of engineering excellence.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal are peerless, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey guys! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely pristine condition—it’s basically like buying brand new without the dealership headache! I’ve babied it since day one, kept it garaged, and it still has that fresh car smell. You won’t find a single flaw on it. It’s a total dream to drive and looks stunning in person. Come take a look, you’re going to love it!

This E92 M3 is a concours-level example featuring the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8. It remains in a pristine, collector-grade state with factory-spec tolerances. The high-revving powerplant delivers linear torque through a lightning-fast 7-speed M-DCT, while the M-Variable differential lock ensures optimal corner-exit traction. The chassis is taut, benefiting from Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and zero bushing deflection. Meticulously maintained with documented rod bearing and throttle actuator preventative services, the vehicle exhibits flawless paint depth and an interior free of bolster wear or UV degradation. A turn-key investment for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Inspection ready.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, this vehicle remains in showroom condition, appearing as if it just rolled off the assembly line. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely no stone chips, swirl marks, or imperfections; it has been protected by a ceramic coating and stored in a climate-controlled environment. The alloy wheels are pristine, without a single mark of curb rash, and are fitted with high-performance tires showing nearly full tread. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule—the premium leather upholstery retains its original factory-fresh scent and matte texture, free of any creasing or bolster wear. Every technological feature, from the high-resolution infotainment system to the ambient lighting, functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a complete service history documented in a comprehensive binder. The engine bay is immaculate, reflecting the meticulous care provided by its single owner. This sale includes all original keys, the factory window sticker, and all owner’s manuals. For the buyer seeking a flawless, collector-grade vehicle, this example is peerless.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior upholstery, reflects a level of care reserved for the most discerning collector. Experience the pinnacle of performance and aesthetic integrity in this investment-grade offering.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine condition, boasting a flawless exterior and an interior that retains its original showroom luster. Mechanically sound and aesthetically indistinguishable from new, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning enthusiast. Every detail has been meticulously scrutinized to ensure it meets our rigorous criteria for performance and presentation.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, it is a total gem! This car is in truly mint condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled right off the showroom floor. It's been meticulously cared for, kept tucked away in the garage, and drives like an absolute dream. You won’t find a cleaner ride out there! I’m so excited for the next owner to get behind the wheel and enjoy it as much as I have. Come see it for yourself, you’re going to love it!

Offered is a museum-grade E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 inline-six powerplant with high-pressure VANOS and individual throttle bodies. This specimen maintains impeccable mechanical integrity with factory-spec subframe reinforcement and a crisp ZF 6-speed manual gearbox. The chassis exhibits zero torsional fatigue, and the suspension geometry remains true to OEM tolerances. Every panel retains original VIN tags and factory paint depth. A turn-key investment for the discerning purist seeking peak atmospheric performance and analog tactile feedback.
Pristine condition. Low mileage. Garage kept. Full service records. No cosmetic or mechanical flaws.

This is an exceptional example of a meticulously maintained vehicle, presented in absolute showroom condition. Finished in a stunning deep metallic paint that has been professionally ceramic coated, the exterior is entirely free of rock chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin retains its original 'new car' scent; the premium leather upholstery shows zero signs of wear on the bolsters, and every electronic component functions flawlessly. Always garaged and never driven in inclement weather, this car has been serviced exclusively at authorized dealerships with a full binder of maintenance records included. From the pristine alloy wheels wrapped in fresh performance tires to the spotless engine bay, this vehicle is indistinguishable from one sitting on a new car lot. It is a turn-key investment for a discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presenting an acquisition opportunity for the discerning enthusiast: a superlative specimen maintained in impeccable condition. This vehicle exhibits zero compromises in aesthetic or mechanical integrity, reflecting a standard of care that borders on the obsessive. Every surface remains in showroom-state, offering an unrivaled driving experience for a clientele that demands nothing short of perfection.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle exhibits no discernible wear, reflecting a level of stewardship rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Every surface, mechanical component, and electronic system operates with showroom-floor precision. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a singular opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly peerless condition.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it’s in such incredible shape that it looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied this car from day one, keeping it spotless and always tucked away in the garage. It drives like a total dream and still has that fresh, brand-new feel to it. If you're looking for a ride that's been loved and kept in pristine condition, this is definitely the one for you! Come swing by and see it for yourself—you're going to love it!

This E36 M3 is an investment-grade specimen featuring the S52B32 power unit with perfectly synchronized VANOS variable valve timing. The drivetrain is anchored by a crisp ZF 5-speed manual transmission feeding a factory 25% lock-up limited-slip differential. The chassis integrity is superlative, with a reinforced rear subframe and a suspension refreshed with Bilstein dampers and poly-bushings for zero-deflection handling. Every VIN tag is present on
Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents. Flawless interior and exterior. Drives like new.

This vehicle is the definition of 'showroom ready.' Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a high-grade ceramic coating. The interior remains in pristine condition, featuring untouched leather upholstery, original premium floor mats, and that distinct new-car atmosphere. Mechanically, it is flawless; it has been serviced exclusively at the dealership with a full paper trail and exceptionally low mileage. Every electronic component, from the infotainment system to the climate control, operates perfectly. This is a rare opportunity to own a turn-key masterpiece that looks and drives as if it just left the factory floor.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom-quality condition, reflecting a legacy of meticulous care and zero compromises. Its flawless exterior and untouched interior cater to the most discerning collector or driver who demands perfection. An acquisition of this caliber represents a rare opportunity to own a vehicle indistinguishable from its original delivery state.
